title: Sour Gooey Japanese Plant-Based Stir-Fry
description: This savory dish combines ghee for a rich flavor with tofu and edamame for a protein boost, all tossed in a tangy sauce infused with umami flavors.

ingredients.name: 1 block (320g) firm tofu
ingredients.amount: grated and pressed to remove excess water

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup soy sauce (use gluten-free if needed)
1 tablespoon agave nectar or maple syrup
6 ounces plant-based sausage, cut into bite-sized pieces (optional)

instructions: Press the tofu with a paper towel or clean kitchen cloth for about 20 minutes to drain excess water.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, rice vinegar, agave nectar, salt, and pepper. Stir well to dissolve sugar.
Heat ghee in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the tofu and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 5 minutes per side. Remove from pan.
In the same pan, add edamame and plant-based sausage (if using). Toast for about 3-4 minutes until lightly browned.
Return the pressed and cooked tofu to the skillet along with the sauce mixture. Stir everything well and cook for another minute or two until heated through.
Spoon the dish onto plates and serve hot.
